# Ett Smart Apartments
> Long-stay serviced apartments in Stockholm (Sollentuna and Kista).

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://www.ettsmart.se/)
- [Contact / Booking request](https://www.ettsmart.se/contact)
- [Sollentuna](https://www.ettsmart.se/sollentuna)
- [Kista](https://www.ettsmart.se/kista)

## Contact
- Phone: +46 8 546 30 800
- Email: info@ettsmart.se

## Locations
- Sollentuna — Address: Sollentunavägen 133, 191 44 Sollentuna, Sweden
- Kista — Address: Finlandsgatan 64, 164 74 Kista, Sweden

## Overview
- Simple self check in via phone and email key delivery (no physical key handling)
- Private units with kitchenette/kitchen, workspace, bathroom; laundry access
- Free high-speed fiber broadband/Wi‑Fi
- Convenient for business or leisure, suitable for short and long stays

## Practical
- Near public transport (train, bus, taxi); 12-minute commuter train to central Stockholm (Sollentuna)
- Fast access to Arlanda Airport and Stockholm City
- Parking available (see location pages for details)
- Kista Galleria nearby (shopping, cinema, fitness)

## Pricing
- On request (contact for quote)
